hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; true

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *".env" ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *".env.example" ]]; then echo 'Blocked: editing .env directly is not allowed. Edit .env.example instead.'; exit 2; fi; true
